_editorial_since_note: Top Videos wall + 'top video' targets only count videos published on/after this date — excludes old Gcore brand/promo videos. Move this date to change the cutoff.
mission: Grow Gcore's channel into the default AI-news destination for enterprise decision-makers — by pairing universal AI questions with data-backed contrarian takes and natural Gcore infrastructure angles.
formula: Universal question + contrarian take + infrastructure angle + natural Gcore integration

targets.label: First editorial video over 10K views
targets.note: Best is currently the OpenAI-vs-Anthropic hit

targets.label: One consistent 5K+ performer / month
targets.note: Top video in the 28-day window vs 5K bar

insights: Editorial long-form is the entire growth engine — ~92% of views, ~97% of watch time. Shorts are negligible here; don't chase them.
Contrarian curiosity beats announcement framing by 10–40×. 'Mac Minis for OpenClaw' (3,652) vs the Dynamo product launch (83) — same channel, same month.
8–12 minutes is the sweet spot. 16+ minute videos consistently underperform relative to content quality.
Topic franchises compound. The OpenClaw / GClaw series has 5 videos and 5,600+ combined views.
The audience is enterprise men skewing older (25–54), Western-geography (US #1, then Germany, UK). They click on evidence, not alarm.
The first 30 seconds decide everything — every video ships hook-first or not at all.
next_up: Plan the next OpenClaw / GClaw franchise video — identify the next question
Revise + ship the Mythos / Project Glasswing editorial script
Run a length audit on the backlog — flag anything over 12 min for a recut
